title: Limnorchis × kelleyi
taxonomy: Limnorchis × kelleyi is a hybrid orchid, resulting from the cross between Limnorchis fragrans and Paphiopedilum victoria-regina. The classification of Limnorchis × kelleyi is a complex one, as it involves the identification of its parent species and their respective taxonomic classifications. As a hybrid orchid, its classification is generally considered to be a subspecies or a cultivar of its parent species. More specifically, Limnorchis × kelleyi is classified within the family Orchidaceae, specifically within the subfamily Cypripedioideae. The classification of Limnorchis × kelleyi is subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of orchid taxonomy.
